title: Cable Matters 2-Pack 3.5mm Audio Cable 1.8 m, 3.5mm Aux Cable, Male to Male - 1.8 Meters
features: Enjoy high fidelity audio with the Cable Matters Male to Male 3.5mm Audio Cable; Connect 3.5mm audio devices together for audio input or output with the aux cord
Aux cable for car is ideal for car auxiliary cord ports; Connect your smartphone’s headphone jack to the male to male audio cable and a car aux port

Double headphone wire is ideal for connecting male 3.5mm headphone jacks on devices to speakers and audio inputs; Connect a smartphone or computer to a speaker system with the 3.5mm male to male stereo aux cable

Premium construction of the audio cord male to male features a braided cable jacket, gold-plated connectors, and bare copper conductors; Male to male headphone jack audio cord is designed for frequent use
Cost-effective two-pack of audio cables 3.5mm jack includes an extra cable; Use another cable on another device, or keep a spare cable in the car on in a laptop bag
